description: Login-gated portals (PlanetBids) need PLANETBIDS_USERNAME/PASSWORD or per-source credentials, else document ingest fails with :login_required (seen in test logs). Required for the RFP-PDF -> analyzer -> contact-extraction chain to actually pull documents from those sources. Wire credential storage/use for at least one real login-gated source.
title: Wire PlanetBids/portal credentials for login-gated document downloads
